tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a slightly elevated LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol. Glycemic control, renal function, and electrolytes are normal. The lipid profile suggests increased cardiovascular risk; lifestyle modification and further cardiovascular assessment are recommended. No evidence of microalbuminuria.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
